title: Gold Rush
description: California Gold Rush (1848-1855) and Placerita Canyon gold discovery (1842) — California's first gold rush

title: Water History
description: Water infrastructure, rights, agencies, and conflicts in the SCV — includes St. Francis Dam, Castaic Lake, water companies

title: Indigenous History
description: Tataviam and other Native peoples of the Santa Clarita Valley — pre-contact through contemporary. See also Tataviam taxonomy.

title: Railroads
description: Southern Pacific Railroad and railroad history in the SCV — includes San Fernando Tunnel, Lang Station

title: Oil Industry
description: Oil exploration, production, and refining in the SCV — includes Pico Canyon, first commercially productive oil well in California

title: Film Industry
description: Motion picture and television production in the SCV — includes silent film era, Melody Ranch, Vasquez Rocks filming locations

title: Agriculture
description: Farming, orchards, vineyards, and ranching in the SCV

title: Architecture
description: Significant buildings, structures, and architectural history

title: Military History
description: Military service, conflicts, veterans, and military installations connected to SCV

title: Politics and Government
description: Local, state, and federal political history — elected officials, legislation, civic governance

title: Law Enforcement
description: Sheriffs, marshals, constables, police, and law enforcement history

title: Education
description: Schools, colleges, educators, and educational history

title: Religion
description: Religious institutions, clergy, and faith community history — includes Mission Catholicism, Protestant denominations, Jewish community

title: Commerce and Trade
description: Business, trade, merchants, and economic history

title: Land Grants
description: Spanish and Mexican land grants — ranchos, grantees, grant boundaries, legal history

title: Natural Disasters
description: Fires, floods, earthquakes, droughts, and other natural disasters affecting SCV — includes St. Francis Dam failure

title: Conservation
description: Environmental conservation, open space, and preservation efforts

title: Arts and Culture
description: Visual arts, performing arts, music, literature, and cultural life
